raw_request: Provide the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9, including the adjustment result used for the release decision.
intent: The disclosed rule requires bot-adjusted, not raw, 30-day retention to be at least 10%.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention, bot-adjusted controlling value only.
expected_value_basis: A verified value at or above 10% would satisfy the retention threshold; a value below 10% would rule out release regardless of the visible raw rate.
